narrative:
DOMINANT DRIVERS

1. USD strength from hot PPI because DXY holds bid and USD CSM ranks second overall on D1 despite H4 fading, anchoring USD pairs directionally
2. AUD relative outperformance because AUD CSM leads at 100 on D1, AUDJPY carries a strong buy on both D1 and H4, and risk-on equity conditions support commodity exposure
3. JPY broad weakness because USDJPY, CADJPY, and EURJPY all move in tight lockstep with correlations above 0.83, and the JPY carry complex is accelerating uniformly with yen cited under fundamental pressure from dollar rally extension

PRICE CONFIRMS

AUDJPY is the lead expression of the dominant cross-asset narrative, with D1 and H4 both confirming strong buy and its correlation cluster with GBPJPY and NZDJPY above 0.87 confirming the move is broad-based across the JPY crosses. USDCAD is printing H4 strong buy in alignment with USDCHF positive correlation and AUD weakness on that cross, confirming USD is selectively firm rather than universally dominant. GBPUSD is a laggard relative to GBP strength on H4 CSM at 100, suggesting GBP acceleration is expressing through JPY crosses rather than USD pairs for now.

REGIME

Mixed leaning risk-on, conflicted. S&P 500 up 0.58 percent and Bitcoin up confirm appetite, but Gold at 4705 still elevated and copper down 0.46 percent undercuts a clean risk-on read, and VIX at 17.87 flat is not pricing fear but not collapsing either.

CONTRADICTIONS

1. GBP CSM vs GBPUSD price: GBP accelerates to 100 on H4 CSM yet GBPUSD carries a H4 sell signal, meaning GBP strength is not flowing into USD pairs despite the fundamental catalyst of UK data beat
2. USD fading H4 CSM at 19 vs bullish USD fundamental bias: hot PPI supports dollar narratively but intraday CSM momentum is decelerating, creating a timing conflict between fundamental and short-term technical flow

TRADE IMPLICATIONS

Best: AUDJPY up - D1 and H4 strong buy aligned, JPY weak, AUD leads CSM - Conviction 8/10
Secondary: USDCAD up - H4 strong buy, AUD and NZD negative correlation confirms, USD PPI bid intact - Conviction 6/10
Avoid: NZDUSD - NZD H4 CSM surges to 99 but D1 CSM only 40, divergence creates whipsaw risk
Watch: DXY breaking above 99.00 on a sustained basis confirms USD H4 CSM fading is temporary and validates USDCAD continuation while also testing the AUDJPY long via risk sentiment reassessment

themes.theme: US Dollar strength from hot PPI data
Trump-Xi summit in Beijing drives risk sentiment and commodity prices
UK economic data beats expectations, supports GBP
ECB hawkish bias supports EUR despite downside risks
JPY weakens as dollar rally extends
INR under pressure from foreign outflows despite tariff support
Tech sector strength offsets inflation concerns
Commodity markets consolidating ahead of summit outcomes

key_observation: USD rallies on hot PPI data while markets await Trump-Xi summit outcome. Tech strength driving equities to record highs. UK data beats support GBP while JPY weakens. INR faces persistent pressure despite tariff support measures.
watch: Trump-Xi summit conclusions and policy announcements. US retail sales data release. ECB inflation commentary. Chinese Yuan trajectory. Oil price reaction to trade negotiations outcome.
